features: „ÄêAll-in-One, Stylishly Professional„Äë 2L smart capacity designed for Pocket/action cameras, plus your phone, earbuds, and daily essentials. This sling bag is perfect for both creative shoots and daily commutes in any scenario.
„ÄêMagnetic Quick-Access„Äë Front magnetic compartment opens with one hand. Perfect for travel, photography, vlogging, and capturing spontaneous moments‚Äîgrab your gear and shoot in seconds.
„Äê3-Layer Organized Storage„Äë Sandwich-style layered design with separate compartments keeps creative gear and daily items neatly sorted for quick, easy access.
„ÄêStyle It Your Way„Äë Built-in TagPort interface compatible with Crocs Jibbitz charms. Endless DIY combinations to express your unique flair.
„ÄêUltra-Light & Durable„Äë Splash-resistant, dirt-proof and wear-resistant fabric for all environments. Weighs only 260g‚Äîreduces load for comfortable all-day wear during commutes or travel.
„ÄêRefined & Reliable„Äë Removable strap for versatile carry options. YKK splash-resistant zipper protects your gear from water splashes.
